Name: Player base STR/AGI/TEC/INT
Variable descriptions: base: Player base attribute per stat (STR, AGI, TEC, INT). Source: 0 (each). level: Character level (1-based). Source: (varies). attributesPerLevel: Flat amount added per level. Source: 0.

Name: Player base max health
Variable descriptions: baseHealth: Player base max health at level 1. Source: 0. level: Character level. Source: (varies). healthPerLevel: Flat health added per level. Source: 0.

Name: Effective max health (with gear)
Variable descriptions: MaxHealth: baseHealth + (level - 1) × healthPerLevel. Source: (computed). equipmentHealthBonus: Sum of health from equipped items. Source: 0 (no gear).

Name: Stat gain per level (with weapon)
Formula: Primary stat +3, others +1 (by weapon: Mace→STR, Sword→AGI, Dagger→TEC, Wand→INT)
Variable descriptions: Primary stat: Attribute that gets +3; from weapon type. Source: (varies by weapon).

Name: Stat gain per level (no weapon)
Variable descriptions: None.

Name: Health gain per level
Formula: healthPerLevel × classHealthMultiplier (then add to MaxHealth, heal to effective max)
Variable descriptions: healthPerLevel: Flat health per level. Source: 0. classHealthMultiplier: Class multiplier (Barbarian, Warrior, Rogue, Wizard). Source: 0 (each class). MaxHealth: From base formula. Source: (computed).

Name: XP to next level (level 1→2)
Variable descriptions: Level: Character level. Source: (varies). EnemyXPBase: Base XP in formula. Source: 0.

Name: XP to next level (level 2+)
Variable descriptions: Level: Character level. Source: (varies). EnemyXPBase: Base XP. Source: 0.

Name: Dungeon XP reward
Formula: random(EnemyXPBase, EnemyXPBase + 50) × player.Level; first dungeon at level 1 boosted to guarantee level-up
Variable descriptions: EnemyXPBase: Base XP. Source: 0. player.Level: Player level. Source: (varies).

Name: Enemy base stats (level 1)
Formula: Health: baseline.Health × (healthPercent / 100); attributes: (baseline × archetype) or explicit baseAttributes; then × globalMultipliers
Variable descriptions: baseline: Enemy baseline stats (health default 70). healthPercent: Per-enemy % of baseline (col P). archetype: Per-archetype multipliers. baseAttributes: Optional explicit level-1 stats. globalMultipliers: healthMultiplier etc.
Default values (source): baseline health 70; healthPercent from Enemies.json; globalMultipliers 0.5,1,1,1 (default patch)

Name: Enemy scaling per level
Formula: Health: (baseline × healthPercent%) + (level - 1) × (baseline × healthGrowthPercent%); STR/AGI/TEC/INT: baseStat + (level - 1) × normalized growthPerLevel; Armor: baseArmor + (level - 1) × scaling.Armor
Variables used: baseline, healthPercent, healthGrowthPercent, level, scaling, baseStat, baseArmor
Variable descriptions: healthPercent/healthGrowthPercent from Enemies.json. level: Enemy level. scaling: Per-level add for armor/attribute fallbacks. baseStat/baseArmor: From baseline × archetype.

Name: Enemy gold reward
Variable descriptions: EnemyGoldBase: Base gold. Source: 0. level: Enemy level. Source: (varies). EnemyGoldPerLevel: Gold per level. Source: 0.

Name: Enemy XP reward (per-enemy value)
Variable descriptions: EnemyXPBase: Base XP. Source: 0. level: Enemy level. Source: (varies). EnemyXPPerLevel: XP per level. Source: 0.

Name: Chance room has enemies (hostile)
Formula: random < hostileRoomChance; else if last room and no hostile yet: forced true
Variable descriptions: random: Uniform [0,1). Source: (varies). hostileRoomChance: Probability room is hostile (has enemies). Source: 0.8.

Name: Enemies per hostile room
Variable descriptions: roomLevel: Room level (from dungeon min–max). Source: (varies). Note: Config has enemyCountPerRoom (default 2) but code uses this formula.
Default values (source): count from roomLevel; config enemyCountPerRoom 2 unused in EnemyGenerationManager

Name: Raw damage (before armor)
Formula: (effectiveSTR + weaponDamage + equipment/mod bonuses) × actionMult × comboMult × damageMult; if roll ≥ crit threshold: × CriticalHitDamageMultiplier; else if combo roll: × ComboRollDamageMultiplier; else basic: × BasicRollDamageMultiplier
Variables used: effectiveSTR, weaponDamage, equipmentDamageBonus, modificationDamageBonus, actionMult, comboMult, damageMult, roll, criticalHitThreshold, CriticalHitDamageMultiplier, ComboRollDamageMultiplier, BasicRollDamageMultiplier
Variable descriptions: effectiveSTR: Attacker strength (base + temp + equipment + mods). Source: (varies). weaponDamage: From weapon. Source: (varies). equipmentDamageBonus: From gear. Source: 0. modificationDamageBonus: From mods. Source: 0. actionMult: Action multiplier. Source: (varies). comboMult: From combo state. damageMult: From effects/params. Source: often 1. roll: Dice (e.g. 1–20). Source: (varies). criticalHitThreshold: Min roll for crit. Source: 20. CriticalHitDamageMultiplier: Source: 1.5. ComboRollDamageMultiplier: Source: 1.1. BasicRollDamageMultiplier: Source: 1.
Default values (source): effectiveSTR/weaponDamage/actionMult/comboMult/roll (varies); equipmentDamageBonus 0; modificationDamageBonus 0; damageMult often 1; criticalHitThreshold 20; CriticalHit 1.5; ComboRoll 1.1; BasicRoll 1

Name: Final damage (after armor)
Formula: max(minimumDamage, totalDamage - targetArmor); if target weakened: × 1.5
Variable descriptions: minimumDamage: Damage floor. Source: 1. totalDamage: Raw damage before armor. Source: (computed). targetArmor: Target armor. Source: (varies; enemy baseline armor 2).

Name: Attack speed (time per attack)
Formula: baseAttackTime × speedMultiplier; speedMultiplier = lerp(agilityMinSpeed, agilityMaxSpeed, (agility - agilityMin) / (agilityMax - agilityMin)); character: (baseTime + weaponSpeedModifier - equipmentSpeedBonus)
Variables used: baseAttackTime, speedMultiplier, agility, agilityMin, agilityMax, agilityMinSpeedMultiplier, agilityMaxSpeedMultiplier, weaponSpeedModifier, equipmentSpeedBonus
Variable descriptions: baseAttackTime: Base time (seconds). Source: 10. speedMultiplier: From agility curve. Source: (computed). agility: Actor agility. Source: (varies). agilityMin: Source: 1. agilityMax: Source: 100. agilityMinSpeedMultiplier: Source: 0.95. agilityMaxSpeedMultiplier: Source: 0.7. weaponSpeedModifier: From weapon (e.g. Mace 0.8, Sword 1, Dagger 1.4, Wand 1.1). equipmentSpeedBonus: From gear. Source: 0.
Default values (source): baseAttackTime 10; agility 1–100; agilityMinSpeed 0.95; agilityMaxSpeed 0.7; weaponSpeed (e.g. 0.8,1,1.4,1.1); equipmentSpeedBonus 0

Name: Hit
Variable descriptions: roll: Dice roll. Source: (varies). HitThreshold: Max roll that still misses; roll > this = hit. Source: 0 (often overridden to 5).

Name: Combo
Variable descriptions: roll: Dice roll. Source: (varies). ComboThreshold: Min roll for combo. Source: 0.

Name: Critical hit
Variable descriptions: roll: Dice roll. Source: (varies). CriticalHitThreshold: Min roll for critical. Source: 20.
